lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Guess what!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a fully-fledged builder!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Marvellous! So you can bring this tower to life!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure about that, but I'll take a look and see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Oh, what a wondrous person you are!

sections.title: Talking to 'Transmute' The Alchemist before starting

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there. What is this place?

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Ah, this be the Tower of Life! Beautiful, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I prefer ordinary houses.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Pah, you have no taste.

sections.title: Talking to 'Transmute' The Alchemist after starting

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a builder!

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: I question why you are so pleased about this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I think it's a positive step in my career as a courageous adventurer.

sections.title: Talking to 'Currency' the Alchemist before starting

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is quite the tower.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Yeah, it cost a fair bit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Well, I had to 'alch' a fair few belongings of my fellow alchemists to afford it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I bet they love you for that.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Everyone loves someone that can create money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi. Sorry, but why do they call you 'Currency'?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: That's down to my interest in all things of monetary value.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You must be pretty rich then.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: I wish. And I was, up until recently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: This tower. Set me back a fair few million.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bet! It pleases you, then, to know that I have just become a builder and have been granted permission to go mess around inside.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: This is not a good day for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi. Interesting building you have here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it for?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You like it? It's simply fabulous, isn't it? A real marvel of modern design made just for my fellow alchemists and I!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see some builders over there. So I assume it's not yet finished.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: What a keen eye this chap has! But imagine this: a gargantuan cylinder of expert design, incorporating an inventive inner spiral walkway to multiple planes of wondrous inhabitance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, it's a tower.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Oh, no, no, no, no.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: It's going to have a use that will change this world!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Or at least it would if we could ever get it finished.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: See those builders?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They don't seem to be building much.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: They've gone on strike for some petty reason about the tower being too weird. I really can't understand those men.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shame.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hey! Maybe you could talk to them?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You look like a sturdy chap.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Maybe you could finish the work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Me?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Come on! This is the chance of a lifetime!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, why not.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: That's fantastic! Oh, I'm so pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Calm down. I'm not making any promises.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Oh, I have a good feeling about this.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Go have a word with Bonafido the head builder. See if you can't get him off his backside to do some work. Oh, and I'm Effigy by the way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice to meet you Effigy, I'm [player name]. Hold on and I'll see what I can do!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Wait a minute.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Don't I recognise you from somewhere?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, do you?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Do you know the outpost north of Ardougne?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes, it's now a small museum. Jorral's looking after it. He's really making history with that place.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Well, the King was going to make that into an alchemy lab for us, but some fool ruined our plans!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes. Shame. Got to go. Bye.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hey, wait up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Best I go sort out this tower. Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, feeling a bit ill today.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: A bit ill?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: That's a weak excuse for a very feeble personality.

sections.title: Speaking with Bonafido, the head builder

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you Bonafido by any chance?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: That I am, mate.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: How can I be of assistance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I've just spoken to Effigy about this tower. He tells me he hired you to work but you're on strike. Something about an extended tea break?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Extended cup o' char? E's got it all wrong, mate. We know those alchemi-whatsits are up ta somefin' weird in building this tower, wot wiv all the machinery, and until we get some answers we're not movin a muscle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, he wanted me to do something about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there no way I can convince you to continue?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Sorry, mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, can I at least have a look inside the tower?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Only builders are allowed in there, like. You don't look like much ov a builder to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take offence at that! Give me a chance; you may be surprised.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Okay. Come to me kitted out like a builder - hard hat, some boots, scruffy trousers and shirt - and I'll let ya try out ta be one ov us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Count me in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Say, that's a nice helmet.

lines.speaker: Black-eye'
lines.text: Why, thanks. Some would say as nice as the one you're wearing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Say, that's a nice helmet.

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Why, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering if you might be able to help me out with one?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Always glad to help a budding builder.

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: But first, prove your Construction knowledge by answering some questions.

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: How many nails does it take to make a rocking chair?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: One? How do you suppose to use a single nail?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Five?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Nope. Keep guessing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Three?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Bingo! Okay, now what takes 3 planks, 3 cloths and 3 nails to make, and helps remove light from a room?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Torn curtains?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Nice one. Last question: I like fish and I want to put some in my garden, but I need a special water feature. What materials would I require?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 8 clay pieces and 3 limestone bricks?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Oh, and you were so close!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 10 clay pieces?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: That's it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greener pastures?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait a minute! Is there blood on this helmet?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Erm, no, that's just, erm, paint. Yes, paint! That's what it is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, okay. Thanks. Bye.

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Ha, gullible fool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 10 limestone bricks?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Guess again, mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A brown rug?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Of course, because that's what everyone needs - a rug up at their window.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Opulent curtains?

lines.speaker: 'Black-eye'
lines.text: Those curtains are not going to be in any way opulent, matey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fancy another?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: Nah, thanks. You've got your shirt and I've got my energy back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! How's this for some booze?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: That's no good. I need some simple beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fancy another?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: Nah, thanks, I'm not drinking that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Beer?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: How do you expect me to drink that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do when you're not lifting logs above your head?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: In my free time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: All sorts. I like...hummff...a good kebab and a cold beer down...urrghh...the pub. And for those quiet evenings...hurrr...

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: A bit of needlepoint is always welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can honestly say you're a very original guy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, I'm looking to get some kit to look like one of you guys.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything you might be able to help me out with?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: Well... Urmph! Ye can 'ave me shirt...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm. Has it been cleaned? I don't want some sweaty hand-me-down.

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: What? Huhmf! It ain't ever been...uurrgg...worn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that sounds good. Can I have it then?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: Can't...hurrr...see why not. This is firsty work doh. Could do wiv a beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. What's your 'usual'?

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: I'm a simple...umph...man. I like the bar in Yanille and their cheap beer...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Simple, cheap beer. No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, today's your lucky day!

lines.speaker: 'The Guns'
lines.text: Ahhh! Smashin...urrghh...deal!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why, hello there!

lines.speaker: 'Gummy'
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Clothing.

lines.speaker: 'Gummy'
lines.text: Nope. Need mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, come on. You know you want to give me free stuff.

lines.speaker: 'Gummy'
lines.text: Stop bothering me, can't you see I'm busy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, VERY busy I'm sure.

lines.speaker: 'Gummy'
lines.text: Okay, okay.

lines.speaker: 'Gummy'
lines.text: The other day I was drying my clothes on a line down by the shore. A storm hit and some of my clothing went missing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Likely story. Sure you weren't skinny dipping?

lines.speaker: 'Gummy'
lines.text: Just go look and leave me be! Search around the tower and you may find them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: No fingers'
lines.text: Don't suppose you've seen any boots around here? Size nine, steel toed, brown leather...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, not at all. I'd best be going. Have a nice day. Bye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. I was just wondering... I don't suppose you have any spare clothing you could lend me?

lines.speaker: 'No fingers
lines.text: ' I do have many boots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, thanks.

lines.speaker: 'No fingers
lines.text: ' But there's no way I'm giving any to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, but why? I could pay you!

lines.speaker: 'No fingers
lines.text: ' Nope. Only real builders can wear builders' boots, and you're not even close.

sections.title: Talking to Bonafido again with the full outfit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi again Bonafido.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Hi, 'Kelsew the Builder'! Been into the tower yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, I'll go when I'm ready. I'm taking my time, may have a quick cup of tea first.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Hahaha.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Bonafido.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Well, if it ain't the wannabe builder!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What clothes do I need?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Ya don't seem to be able ta remember anyfin'... Dearie me.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Come back to me wearin' a hard hat, some scruffy trousers, a good top and some hard boots. Yow shud fand some around 'ere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So...

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Like a builder frew and frew! Good job - now it's time to test your skills.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, what do you want me to build?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Build?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Build? Hahaha, don't be a plonka!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: It's not building skills that makes a true builder, you have to have the right mental attitude, yeah?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: You've plenty of work to do, but you need a drink fast - what do you go for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Orange juice.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: What are you? A healthy builder? Of course, not juice!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tea.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Bingo! Ain't nufin' betta.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Now, let's hear you whistle!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: What on Gielinor are you doing? Get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: You know, you have quite a talent there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why thank you. Do you think I have what it takes to become a famous whistler?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Wahey! Nice one. Next question.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: What's a good sign that you need to replace your trousers?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your legs are getting a bit cold?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Exactamondo! Glad to see you are thinking like a builder.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Yes, obviously if your legs are cold, you lost your trousers altogether!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's just what I was thinking.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Now the last question - what do you do if you cut your finger?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cry.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: When was the last time you saw a builder cry?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Carry on, it'll fix itself.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Yep, that's the one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Suppose it could get infected then, but that'll just impress the lads all the more.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Exactly, you're gettin the hang of this quickly!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Cosmic! I canna see no reason why ya can't go in t'tower now. But be careful, there be some precarious situations in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what's left to build?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Well, there's a pipe system, a pressure machine and a strange cage up at the top that needs finishing off. The alchemists couldn't explain what they were for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fetch a plaster and ointment.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Look, [player name], let me give you a bit of advice. If you want to look weak, that's the best way to go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're ripped and full of holes.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: No, no, no. That's the only way they should be!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The colour is starting to fade?

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Oh no, you're really not getting the hang of this are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bottle of wine.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Ooh, get Mr Fancy Pants here and his posh wine! You're no builder.

sections.title: Talking to Bonafido after entering the Tower

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Heya, Bona. I had a look at the building. There's some complex machinery in there! Going to cost someone.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Yep, told ya so. Any idea what those alchemists are up ta?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I agree now they're up to something. The question is what...? I don't think we're going to find out much from the alchmists, though.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: So what are you going to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I shall see if I can't fix it up and see for myself what is going on. Should be able to get a good reward from them. But don't worry, I'll make sure your efforts don't go unpaid.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: You're a star among builders, that ya are!

sections.title: Talking to Effigy after entering the Tower

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again, Effigy. I've had a nose around the tower. There's a lot of work to do!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: I know, I know. But think of how fantastical it will be when it is finished!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why fantastical? What are all those pipes and machines in there? What are you trying to do?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Fantastic weather we're having today!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what are the-

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: The sun is shining... The birds are singing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! Answer my question!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hehe. Just fix the tower. You'll soon see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'd best pay me well for this.

sections.title: Talking to 'Transmute' the Alchemist after entering the Tower

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I must say, the inside of the tower is really something to behold.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Why, thanks. You'll find various pieces of machinery to fix in there. You can no doubt find the materials in there, too.

sections.title: Talking to 'Currency' the Alchemist after entering the Tower

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, Currency. Got any spare cash?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Nope; you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, do you?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Afraid not. You?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm going to stop before this gets violent.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, this place looks special. Best I look around for something to fix.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've fixed all the machinery.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hurrah! Splendiferous!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now listen, what does it all do? Why are you-

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Years of devoted work; it's complete!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hey, guys! It's finished!

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: At last! Our work is complete!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: I can almost taste the riches!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: To the top of the tower, fellow alchemists!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait! What about-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why does nobody listen? Best if I follow them, I suppose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm really getting annoyed with those alchemists.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I completed the tower and I still have no idea what it does, and then as soon as I tell Effigy of my hard work, he doesn't say one word of thanks and legs it off into the tower!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Well, I'll be a rabbit in da eyes of a fox! Best ya chase after 'im then and get us our dosh! Don't you do a runner, now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm not about to let Effigy get away with treating us builders like this!

sections.title: Going to the top of the tower

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What on Gielinor is...

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: It is time, my friends! The culmination of our work is complete!

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Long time indeed!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Many hours we have worked!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: A great many years of planning and preparation has brought us here, my fellow alchemists. Now we have... The Tower of Life! We can already create gold, we can already transform matter from one thing to

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: another, and now we have the ability to create life itself! We owe much to the power of Guthix, for without the life essence he left below ground, we would never have been able to bring this tower alive!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're insane!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: It begins! The first day of creation!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: It worked!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Marvellous!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is this possible?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: It's alive!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: We did it. A Homunculus!

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Beautiful.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Nwwooo! Whyyy? Where meee? Glarrraaa.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: It can talk! A real success.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Where me? Skin burn...arrgh...eyes hurt...let me go!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Excellent, it can feel! It's self-aware. This is really a great day.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Whyeee cage? Argh...please help me! Graaahhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is terrible, you must do something!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Ah, it's our helper. Thank you for fixing the tower; we will reward you greatly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want a reward, just let it go. Can't you see it's in pain?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Don't worry. It has no soul; it has no worth.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Yes, it's just an experiment in alchemy.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: The creature must be grateful for his creation.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: You create hurt. Not fair, let me free!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Silence, creature!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Yes, be still and quit your moaning.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: No, mean, nasty peoples.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Shut up, you pathetic being.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Arghh! Let me go!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Don't make us hurt you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop this! Let it go!

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: So horrible beings. Daarrrr!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's getting angry.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You should know your place, adventurer. This is no concern of yours now.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: You should be satisfied and leave. Then we can begin our experiments.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not wise.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Arghhh!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Oh no...

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Get out of the tower before it's too late!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Run away!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Flee for your lives!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They've run away. I must go confront those alchemists downstairs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You won't BELIEVE what I just saw!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: What? What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That tower is... a tower of life! I just witnessed with my very own eyes the creation of an homunculus!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: A homanque-what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Homunculus! They have found a way of creating life itself, but the creature they have made is not a happy being.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: And our money?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you listening at all? This creature is very dangerous, it needs to be stopped! And fast!

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: I'm glad you've got the money sorted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't believe what you guys have done.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Marvellous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. Scary!

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: That too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That is one very sad creature.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: It'll be alright; it just needs a pat on the back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why am I suddenly glad that you're not responsible for sorting out this mess?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, Effigy.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Have you spoken to our wondrously fabulous creation yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't spoken to it at all. Give me a chance. And please stop your overuse of adjectives.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: What a hideously, unforgiveable and insensitive combination of dialogue to supply to a friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I swear you'll get a knuckle sandwich sometime soon if you don't shut up.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Charming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm off to talk to the Homunculus.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Rather you than me. Can't say you look like you'll make it out alive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the support. How about saying something encouraging.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. How about 'You can do it!' or 'That Homunculus is in for a surprise'.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: So, you want me to lie?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Forget it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'm going to go chat with the Homunculus.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Very good.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Could you do us a favour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I probably have enough on my plate, but go ahead; what?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Could you ask it a question?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which is?

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Does it have any spare cash?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me think how I can phrase this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Effigy!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: I know, I know. This is a truly dangerous creation, of all proportions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you learn from this.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: I will, I will. Next time we'll use a stronger cage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: A bad joke.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll just ignore that. So, what about that Homunculus up there? You can't just leave it.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Maybe you could go have a talk with it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why me? You created it!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Pleeeaaase.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Pretty please with a cherry on top?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: I'll make sure you're compensated. You won't be forgotten for this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do I get the feeling I'm doomed to go face that creature on my own?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Good on you! I knew you would help us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well. They do say that experience teaches fools.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Leeet mwwe free. Argyyghh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's okay, I'm here to help you.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Lieees. Grahhh

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, honest. I helped the alchemists, but I had no idea what their plans involved.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Arggh, so alchemist create me now I trapped for experiements. But still I confused.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Me see logic, feeeel magic. A mix of the two.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm. A creature created of logic and magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't fear. I shall fix your mind!

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: No so sure it is easy to do. No one canna 'elp. Arghhh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Watch me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You tell me that you're confused, so ask me some questions!

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Ah, please...

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: That it! Make sense now, thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I decided to root for magic.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: No does matter which you chose. Me needed organise my thoughts. I see there is truth in both.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Now we go scare alchemies - they have been wrong to do this! Although I have life, they mustn't go about this again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like a good plan. Can you get out of that cage?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Easy. You run down and I watching from here. I surprise right moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

sections.title: Leaving and talking to the Homunculus before helping it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's me again, Homunculus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you remember?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Stranger... nooo, help meee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stay calm, let's do this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Better. You been mine angel. I now have the understanding I need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My pleasure.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Please, alchemists you speak, me appear to surprise.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure I understand, but okay, I will go have a word with them.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, Bonafido.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Hi. How's the tower?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Finished, really.

lines.speaker: Bonafido
lines.text: Looks like we're out of a job then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I wouldn't worry about it. There are frequently new buildings required around Gielinor. I'm sure your services will be called upon again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I've sat down and had a good chat with the Homunculus.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'll soon find out!

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Homunculus is a bit better off now.

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Excellent. So we can go back in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not just yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Effigy, I need a word with you.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You've killed it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not quite...

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Boo.

lines.speaker: Transmute' The Alchemist
lines.text: Oh no, look!

lines.speaker: Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Arrghhh! Have mercy!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You set it free. Oh, please don't hurt me!

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Hahaha.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Me not hurt. Now tell. What you plans? What you do with me?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Please, we just wanted to experiment. We wanted to create life. There's a dungeon under the tower. Long ago we found a strange source of energy that we believe was left behind by the great Guthix. He used to

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: create life with such ease. We realised we should be able to use this powerful substance, but we needed to bring together our magic along with the logical construction of the builders. It seemed through our experiments that

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: even magic needs a certain level of rules and laws to work.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Bad play with. Naughty men. Go! Go, never return!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Right away, right away!

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Me look dungeon, [player name]. Please meet there.

sections.title: Talking to the Homunculus in the basement

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This place is bizarre!

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Me do know. Pleased you rescue.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My pleasure. So what is this place?

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: They use essence of Guthix power. Create tower pump this from ground. Make me with godly power. Dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, but you're okay now. You have this place to reside in.

lines.speaker: Homunculus
lines.text: Thrank you. For reward you speak me, I makes monsters.
